title: gamogyne helix
intro: Gamogyne helix, also known as the twisted gamogyne or twisted root, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Gamogyne helix can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal use, and it is also used in some herbal remedies for its potential health benefits.
